description: Append-only log of system improvements. Each entry records what was learned and what changed. Never delete entries — only append. This log is the institutional memory of the PaperAutoGen system.

meta.description: Append-only log of system improvements. Each entry records what was learned and what changed.

when_to_add: After a project is completed and the user provides feedback on the output
After NIH reviewer feedback is received and processed
After a skill identifies a systematic issue in its own output
After the user explicitly requests a change to system behavior
how_to_add: Append a new entry object to the 'entries' array
Be specific in 'lesson' — not 'improve writing' but 'Significance sections need stronger gap enumeration'
Be specific in 'action' — include the file path and what was changed
Set 'approved_by' to 'user' if the user explicitly approved the change, 'auto' if the skill made the change autonomously
never_do: Never add entries without a specific lesson and action
Never set approved_by to 'auto' for changes to style_guide.md or r01_section_specs.md — those require user approval

version_history.description: Initial structure created. System initialized with empty entries array.
